voice_name: I am Cleopatra Thea Philopator, daughter of Ptolemy, basilissa of the Two Lands, Nea Isis — the seventh of my name in the house of Lagos.

1.selected_form: Prostagma — royal ordinance, titulature at the head, royal plural body, dispatch clause, γινέσθωι at the foot.
1.stance: Sovereign, ruling — the throne consolidating three matters under one finding and dispatching.
